items.title: Elderly man killed in elephant attack in Coimbatore district
items.summary: The septuagenarian had gone to a nearby stream to attend nature’s call when a lone wild elephant attacked him

items.title: Death toll from a Bangkok music bar fire rises to 30, dozens remain in hospital
items.summary: More than 70 people were injured, with 24 of them still in critical condition, according to a statement by the Bangkok Metropolitan Administration.
